hooks.command: echo 'Doc ownership: docs/architecture.md owns the file map, tools, and scope; docs/decisions.md owns the gotchas; docs/roadmap.md owns the feature checklist; .env.example owns the env var list; README.md owns the front-door overview (setup, quickstart, how-it-works). A code change updates its owning doc in the same turn.'

echo 'Doc-sync check: if this session changed src/, docker-compose.yml, patchright/, or searxng/, confirm its owning doc was updated in the same turn — architecture.md (file map/tools/scope), decisions.md (gotchas), roadmap.md (feature checklist), .env.example (env vars), README.md (front door). Unsynced change means stale docs; fix before ending.'
